key_feature: 15-yr lock-in extendable in 5-yr blocks. Spouse + each minor child can have separate PPF.
12% employee + 12% employer (split 3.67% EPF + 8.33% EPS). Above 2.5L/yr contribution interest taxable.
Tier-I locked till 60. At 60: 60% lump sum tax-free, 40% mandatory annuity (annuity income at slab).
Liquid NPS - treated like a debt MF for tax. No lock-in.
Girl child below age 10 only. Higher rate than PPF.
Age >= 60 (or 55 with VRS). Interest paid quarterly - taxable at slab.
Annual interest reinvested counts as 80C deduction (years 1-4). Maturity interest taxable.
5-yr lock-in. Interest fully taxable. Worse than PPF unless you specifically want bank deposit insurance.
Lowest lock-in among 80C options. Equity tax treatment (12.5% LTCG above 1.25L/FY exempt).
